big_problem: Explore share cards hide the Razzle watermark unless download=1 — OS screenshots miss the growth loop.
epic: Explore L5 — OG watermark band always visible on screener share cards
slice_title: Screener OG card shows always-on terracotta watermark band
parity_ref: Explore L5 — Bureau H2H export or Lab panel OG data rows
acceptance_commands: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('apps/web/app/og/explore/route.tsx','utf8'); if(!/watermark band/i.test(s)&&!/(?:always|Always).*(?:band|Band)/.test(s)) { console.error('missing watermark band'); process.exit(1); } if(!/#d97757/.test(s)) process.exit(1);"
